title: Duzzit Antibacterial Wipes - Kills 99.9% of Bacteria | 100% Biodegradable - Made From Plant Fibres | Anti Bac Wipe for Kitchen Surfaces, Waste Bins, Bathrooms & More (60 Wipes, Grapefruit)
features: ANTIBACTERIAL POWER: These antibacterial wipes kill 99.9% of bacteria, making them ideal for homes that need effective and fast surface cleaning. Use them on kitchen counters after cooking or wipe down bathroom taps for instant hygiene.

100% BIODEGRADABLE: Made with plant-based fibres, these surface wipes are fully biodegradable, helping reduce plastic waste. Clean with confidence knowing you're making an eco-conscious choice for everyday cleaning.

MULTIPURPOSE CLEANING: These cleaning wipes are suitable for use on kitchen worktops, bathroom tiles, waste bins, and more. Keep a pack handy in the kitchen or under the sink for quick and effective cleaning all around the home.

CHOICE OF FRESH SCENTS: Choose from a bright citrus fresh or uplifting grapefruit fragrance to leave rooms smelling clean and energised. Great for freshening up your kitchen after cooking or giving bathrooms a zingy boost.

HANDY RESEALABLE PACK: The resealable 60-wipe pack keeps wipes moist and ready to use whenever needed. Pop a pack in the car, office drawer or utility cupboard for quick access during everyday cleaning tasks.

GENTLE ON SKIN: With a mild, skin-friendly formula, these anti bac wipes are suitable for everyday use. Ideal for quick clean-ups when guests pop round or wiping high-touch areas like light switches and door handles.

STRONG AND DURABLE: Each wipe is thick and tear-resistant, making it easy to tackle stubborn dirt and spills. Use them for wiping down sticky dining tables, cleaning bathroom sinks or removing marks from fridge doors.

PERFECT FOR BUSY HOMES: These kitchen wipes are a practical addition to any cleaning routine. Whether it’s a post-dinner wipe-down or a midweek refresh, they help keep your space clean with minimal effort.

IDEAL FOR ON-THE-GO CLEANING: Compact and lightweight, these cleaning wipes are great for cleaning hands, car interiors, or picnic tables when out and about. A versatile choice for holidays, camping or lunch at the park.

ESSENTIAL CLEANING SUPPLIES: A must-have for any home or workplace, these antibacterial surface wipes are part of a reliable range of cleaning products. Stock up and stay prepared for messes, spills and everyday hygiene.
description: Product Description Keep your home fresh, hygienic, and smelling great with Duzzit Antibacterial Wipes. Made from 100% biodegradable plant fibres, these powerful cleaning wipes are tough on dirt yet kind to the environment. Each pack contains 60 anti bac wipes, ideal for quick clean-ups or everyday surface cleaning. Whether it’s kitchen worktops, bathroom tiles, or even waste bins, these multipurpose wipes kill 99.9% of bacteria while leaving behind a zesty citrus or grapefruit scent. Easy to use and resealable to lock in freshness, these surface wipes are an essential part of your cleaning supplies. Designed for everyday convenience, they combine strong antibacterial power with eco-friendly materials for guilt-free cleaning around your home. Perfect for busy households, student flats, offices and more, these cleaning wipes are a quick and effective way to stay on top of hygiene, without the need for sprays or cloths. USE BIOCIDES SAFELY. ALWAYS READ THE LABEL AND PRODUCT INFORMATION BEFORE USE. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Hexyl Cinnamal, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone, Disinfectants. Directions * Peel back resealable label on the front of pack * Remove wipes as required * Wipe across surface and leave to dry. * Ensure kitchen surfaces are completely dry after use and before food preparation/storage. * Carefully reseal pack after use to prevent wipes from drying out. See more
